---
title: "Scalable R Package Qualification Using a CI/CD Approach"
css: slides.css
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    footer: <a href="hhttps://gilead-biostats.github.io/qcthat/">gilead-biostats.github.io/qcthat</a>
    link-external-newwindow: true
    transition: slide
    incremental: false
---

## Coming soon
